strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience with multi-language proficiency (TypeScript, D, C++, Java, etc.)
Hands-on involvement in event-driven systems and microservices at scale (e.g., Dunnhumby's real-time services)
Active contribution to AI-agent infrastructure and emerging standards (e.g., MCP, Model Context Protocol)
concerns: Limited direct fintech or credit-risk experience in regulated environments
No explicit mention of production multi-agent AI systems in commercial fintech contexts
Short tenure at most recent roles (e.g., re:cinq since April 2025) may indicate job-hopping pattern
response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong technical versatility and event-driven system experience, with recent work touching agentic-AI tooling. However, the resume lacks evidence of scaling multi-agent systems in fintech or regulated commercial environments, which are core to the role. His background in real-time systems and distributed architectures is relevant but not sufficient to offset the high-weight gaps in agentic-AI fintech integration and leadership at scale.
